description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that triggers on push. Run a multi-job workflow with three jobs: build_docker, build_mac, and build_windows. The build_docker job uses a matrix strategy to build Docker images for multiple targets on ubuntu-latest. The build_mac job runs on macos-latest and uses cmake and ctest actions to build and test. The build_windows job uses a matrix strategy to build on windows-latest with different shared library configurations.
